message:
fix(cli): apply safe copy-validate-swap pattern to backup restore path

The backup restore path in recover_sqlite_file_with_storage_root had the
same vulnerability as the reconstruct path (issue #59): it quarantined
the corrupt DB before proving the backup copy would succeed. If the copy
failed (disk full, permissions), the user would be left without a DB.

Now copies to a temp path first, validates health, then quarantines the
original and swaps — matching the safe pattern already used by the
reconstruct path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
